title: eulophia walleri
intro: Eulophia walleri, also known as the African orchid or forest orchid, is a terrestrial orchid species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Eulophia walleri include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of certain diseases. In traditional herbal medicine, the roots of the plant are often prepared as a decoction or infusion for various health benefits.
